functionalRootCause.competingOwners: The read owner rewrites portal and bank rows during edit mode.
functionalRootCause.snapshotContractMismatch: The edit owner removes data-cuso while the canonical snapshot dereferences it.
functionalRootCause.fakeAccountCreation: The add handler creates a random masked number.
functionalRootCause.currentTabNotCommitted: Save does not force a snapshot of the visible tab.
functionalRootCause.injectedUsernameNotWired: Username is inserted outside canonical wiring.
functionalRootCause.credentialMutationBlocked: Password update is prohibited instead of routed to the secure provider.
functionalRootCause.writeAcknowledgementMissing: Edit closes before Firestore write acknowledgement.
functionalRootCause.autoadministrationGap: Mutable tenant configuration must move to configuracion_catalogo before production.

pipelineRootCauseHistory.cause: The v1 generator removed the closing bootstrap comment delimiter.
The diagnostic shell inherited -e and stopped after capturing the exact fifth-file syntax error.
The v2 validator used path.resolve(__dirname, '..', '..') and searched modules/aseguradoras.js from repository root instead of orbit360-platform.

workPlanPriority.productionGate: All listed modules must be operational, persistent, role-correct and dynamically configurable before production authorization.
workPlanPriority.tariffKnowledge: Preserve mapped evidence now; integrate and expose it per insurer with Cotizador/Comparativo without blocking the operational directory repair.

nextAllowedStep: Execute the corrected deterministic patch with the platform-root validator exactly once. Accept only a single generated commit with all 23 checks passing and zero secrets, data access, runtime, browser, deploy, Functions, Rules, production or reimport activity.
